name: oscar-risk-pricing-mcp
description: Clause-risk benchmarking MCP for Oscar GC's Lavern partners. Net-new (NOT a lift): Lavern's risk-pricing.ts is orchestration scaffolding around a subagent, not substantive pricing. This MCP exposes assess_clause_risk + list_clause_benchmarks against a hardcoded benchmark table seeded with mid-market US norms for common clause types. Sprint 22 placeholder; future sprints widen the benchmark distribution.
author: s-arturko
